title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 228.130 - No revocation of order establishing or vacating road — amendment of order
text:
228.130.  No revocation of order establishing or vacating road — amendment of order. — The county commission shall not revoke or set aside any order establishing or vacating any public road, nor shall a petition to vacate or reestablish such road be entertained by such county commission for a period of one year from the time of entering the order; except that the county commission may amend any such order where necessary to carry out the purposes of this law.
(L. 1949 p. 551 § 8477)
